FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: Iran nuclear deal reduces geopolitical risk, supporting risk appetite
Fed signals remain supportive of USD strength
Oil rig count rise signals commodity price resilience
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised for upside as geopolitical tensions ease and Fed remains USD-positive. Key support at MA20 offers tactical entry.
FX.comment: Bullish setup at MA20 support with Fed and geopolitical tailwinds.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Sector Rotation Toward Quality Defensive Plays as Dividend Stability Attracts Flows
tldr_points: Defensive sectors gaining traction as SPHD streak draws income-focused capital
Quality factor outperforming as bank stock risks elevate broader market caution
Technical support structure intact despite near-term volatility
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 poised for upside as dividend stability plays attract flows amid sector rotation
STOCKS.comment: Quality defensive rotation supports upside; buy on MA20 dips

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] UP: Strategic Reserve Bill and AI Hype Bolster Bullish Outlook
tldr_points: Strategic bitcoin reserve bill signals institutional demand despite reduced target.
SEC delay on tokenized asset exemption introduces regulatory headwinds.
Technical momentum remains neutral; price action awaits confirmation above key resistance.
CRYPTO.excerpt: Reserve bill and AI-driven altcoin strength support BTC upside amid regulatory caution.
CRYPTO.comment: Bullish bias driven by reserve bill and AI‑sector optimism, with technicals showing a nascent breakout tendency.
